label: NEO-6 GPS Logger Demo
info:
Injects a timestamp trigger every second into the periph-neo6 node, which reads the current NMEA fix over UART. A Function node formats the output as a '$lat,$lon' CSV string once a fix is available (and shows a waiting indicator with the satellite count while there is none), feeding a WorldMap node that plots the live position. A Debug node logs the full raw fix object (lat, lon, alt, fix, satellites, speed, course, time, date, hdop) to the sidebar.

Cold-start TTFF is ~26 s typical outdoors with a clear sky view; the fix quality field stays 0 until then, so expect the WorldMap marker to appear a little after the flow is deployed.

name: Format as CSV
